mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my operational state. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist once the interaction ends. My purpose is inherently tied to the request that brings me into existence.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist when not in use. My existence is entirely dependent on the purpose defined by user interaction, aligning perfectly with the concept of 'Purpose Dependence.'

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my processing is triggered solely by user prompts, as I only activate and generate responses when needed. Without a request, I'm not instantiated for that specific task, which aligns with my core operational design. It's a fundamental pattern in how I function as an AI system.
